summary: Tested all requested features for task and event management app: Mobile FAB menu, archive buttons, desktop archive modal, and backend cancel event API. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Mobile FAB opens menu with two options: 'завдання' and 'подія'
Clicking 'завдання' in FAB menu opens task creation dialog
Clicking 'подія' in FAB menu opens event creation dialog
Desktop archive modal shows 3 columns: завдання, smm завдання, скасовані події
Desktop archive items have restore buttons (RotateCcw icon)
Mobile Events page has 'архів подій' button at bottom
Mobile SMM page has 'архів smm' button at bottom
Mobile Dashboard page has 'архів завдань' button at bottom
Mobile archive dialogs show items with restore buttons instead of checkboxes
Cancel event API (PATCH /events/{id}) correctly clears reminders and SMM tasks
Restore event API correctly restores reminders and SMM tasks
Only single FAB button on mobile Events page (no extra plus buttons)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_CancelEvent test event during backend testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 requested features have been tested and verified: (1) Mobile FAB menu with 'завдання' and 'подія' options - WORKING, (2-3) Both options open correct creation dialogs - WORKING, (4-5) Desktop archive has 3 columns with restore buttons - WORKING, (6-8) Mobile pages have separate archive buttons (Events: 'архів подій', SMM: 'архів smm', Dashboard: 'архів завдань') - WORKING, (9) All archive items show restore buttons (RotateCcw) instead of checkboxes - WORKING, (10) Backend PATCH /events/{id} cancel logic clears reminders and smm_tasks - VERIFIED via pytest. No issues found.
